name_en: 💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖【New】MIU Vintage Crossbody Dumpling Bag, brand new soft calfskin, full of retro nostalgia, paired with aged steel hardware, premium and elegant texture. The bag features a drawstring closure, with fine pleated ruffles that are 3D and playful, sophisticated yet lazy and casual. Lined with brand new striped canvas, equipped with a zippered compartment. A unique design that looks good on everyone.
name_cn:

Color: Ebony Full Leather/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
